n: Instance: A Spear at the Southern March

steps.t: Andrew Oakhurst is behind the line of Wardens south of Bree-town. Warden Oakhurst is waiting to speak with you.
Toby Thorndyke is at your place in the line of Wardens defending Bree-town from attack from the south.
Andrew Oakhurst is behind the line of Wardens south of Bree-town. The attack has been successfully repelled, and you should speak now to Warden Oakhur…
